channel.title: WaveKit Wuthering Waves Guides
channel.description: Latest WaveKit Wuthering Waves team helper updates, Resonator build guides, weapon notes, Echo/Sonata guidance, and character pages.

item.title: Wuthering Waves Weapon and Material Planner
item.description: Search Wuthering Waves weapons, see useful Resonators, and calculate exact weapon ascension materials, EXP, and Shell Credits.

item.title: WaveKit Wuthering Waves Team Helper
item.description: Build Wuthering Waves teams from the Resonators and weapons you actually own, then open build cards for Echoes, Sonata effects, weapons, and play notes.

item.title: Wuthering Waves Character Guides
item.description: Browse WaveKit Resonator guides with builds, weapons, Echo/Sonata notes, team direction, and links into the account-aware team helper.

item.title: Sigrika Build, Teams, Weapons, and Echoes
item.description: Sigrika Wuthering Waves build guide with team direction, weapons, Echo/Sonata setup, stats, and player-friendly notes.

item.title: Cartethyia Build, Teams, Weapons, and Echoes
item.description: Cartethyia Wuthering Waves build guide with team shells, weapons, Windward Pilgrimage notes, Echo setup, and account-aware helper links.

item.title: Shorekeeper Build, Teams, Weapons, and Echoes
item.description: Shorekeeper Wuthering Waves guide for sustain, support builds, weapons, Rejuvenating Glow, Echo setup, and safer team planning.

item.title: Aemeath Build, Teams, Weapons, and Echoes
item.description: Aemeath Wuthering Waves build guide with weapons, Echoes, Sonata, team direction, and simple notes for readable team building.

item.title: Augusta Build, Teams, Weapons, and Echoes
item.description: Augusta Wuthering Waves guide with build direction, weapons, Echo/Sonata setup, teams, and account-aware planning notes.

item.title: Jinhsi Build, Teams, Weapons, and Echoes
item.description: Jinhsi Wuthering Waves build guide with team shells, weapons, Celestial Light notes, Echo setup, and beginner-readable build priorities.
